description: IAM Roles required for Databricks Classic (Custom VPC) workspace deployment

roles.description: Databricks cross-account role assumed by the Databricks control plane to manage EC2 instances, volumes, fleets, launch templates, and networking for Classic compute clusters.
roles.trust_entity: Databricks AWS Account (414351767826 for commercial, 044793339203 for GovCloud civilian, 170661010020 for GovCloud DoD)

roles.description: Allows Databricks to deliver audit logs to a customer-managed S3 bucket. Created conditionally when audit log delivery is enabled.
roles.notes: No inline policy attached; access is granted via S3 bucket policy on the audit log bucket.

roles.description: Unity Catalog IAM role providing S3 and KMS access for the catalog storage credential. Allows Databricks Unity Catalog to read/write catalog data.
roles.trust_entity: Self-assume + Databricks Unity Catalog Master Role (arn:aws:iam::414351767826:role/unity-catalog-prod-UCMasterRole-14S5ZJVKOTYTL)
